pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin version to support Java 11 compilation features.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older plugin versions may not fully support or correctly handle the 'release' flag or Java 11 bytecode generation.

pom.xml.general_idea: Switch compiler configuration from source/target to release flag for Java 11.
pom.xml.why_exists: The 'release' flag is the standard way to compile for Java 11+ and ensures API leakage prevention; source/target are deprecated for this purpose in newer JDKs.
The compilerVersion setting is redundant when using the release flag and modern plugin versions.
